cold_eye.title: Craft the Cold Eye (center: Ice Crystal + Aquamirae fin, gazing pearl, icy pearl, storm essence)

place_cold.title: Place the Cold Eye in the End Portal frame

subtitle.text: Three frames. The portal is beginning to understand you.

description: - aquamirae:fin (Captain Cornelia or sea creature drop)
The Cataclysm essence comes from Ch11 boss chains.
The Cold Eye may not be craftable until Ch11 ingredients are collected.
This is normal. The Eye Hunt spans multiple chapters.
The portal is not rushed. The inheritance is not conditional on speed.
→ Craft the Cold Eye when all ingredients are ready [check]
→ Place the Cold Eye in the frame [check]
